critical_implementation_rules: do not shrink Product SOT scope inside a work unit
security_and_privacy_rules: no private data, secrets or raw source dumps in public artifacts
testing_and_verification_rules: each work unit declares commands and expected result
ux_and_product_face_rules: visible surfaces must satisfy Product Experience and Product Face packets
release_and_operations_rules: production work follows the promotion ladder
generic_patterns_to_avoid: generic best practice that contradicts the Product SOT or architecture
refresh_policy: Refresh after Product SOT, architecture, product creation plan or major implementation convention changes.
public_safety_policy: Use public-safe refs and compact rules; do not store private notes or raw research.
